name: Brain Immune System
observations: B Cells, T Cells, Antibodies, Cytokines

name: NIMCP_Code_Review_Dec2024
observations: Comprehensive parallel code review of entire NIMCP codebase completed Dec 24, 2024

8 parallel agents reviewed: Core Brain (7.5/10), Cognitive (8.7/10), Plasticity (8.2/10), Async/Middleware (7.8/10), Swarm/Security (7.8/10), Glial/Perception (7.7/10), LNN/SNN (7.7/10), Utils/Portia (8.2/10)
75 files fixed with 17,244 insertions and 652 deletions
Fixed LNN RNG seeding for reproducibility (set_rng_seed, randn_reset functions)
Fixed TRAINING_INSTABILITY_* → LOGIC_INSTABILITY_* enum names in 5 test files
Verified 183 tests passing (tensor:51, router:48, LNN config:24, neuron:34, layer:26)
Second comprehensive code review completed Dec 24, 2024
Core Brain: 7.5/10 - const-cast mutex, memory leak in error paths
LNN/Training: 7.5/10 - gradient explosion risk, missing grad_W_in, CNN backward stub
Cognitive: 7.5/10 - mutex lock/unlock imbalance in 6 files, const violations
Plasticity: 7.5/10 - missing spinlock in modulated STDP, race window in heterosynaptic
Perception: 7.5/10 - visual cortex memory leak, inconsistent CoW atomics
Middleware: 7.5/10 - callback race condition, mutex lock order risk
Swarm/Security: 7.0/10 - CRITICAL hardcoded HMAC key, ID generation race
Utils/Infrastructure: 7.5/10 - pthread/nimcp mutex mix, memory tracker infinite loop risk
P0 Critical: 6 issues (hardcoded key, races, mutex imbalance, spinlock)
P1 High: 7 issues (gradient explosion, memory leaks, const-cast)
P2 Medium: 7 issues (CNN stub, weight init, realloc safety)

name: LNN_Training_Fix
observations: Fixed SHOWSTOPPER: LNN training was completely broken due to incomplete gradient computation
Implemented batch processing loop in nimcp_lnn_training.c:561-627
Implemented epoch training loop in nimcp_lnn_training.c:647-716
Completed layer backward pass with adjoint method in nimcp_lnn_layer.c:633-736
Added numerical stability guard (tau² epsilon) in nimcp_lnn_neuron.c:575

name: Thread_Safety_Fixes
observations: Added STDP spinlock for weight modifications in nimcp_stdp.c
Fixed bio-async callback race condition with mutex in nimcp_bio_async.c:729
Implemented thread-local RNG across LNN modules (neuron, layer, wiring)
Fixed homeostatic controller mutex usage in nimcp_homeostatic.c:651-757
Fixed spurious wakeup vulnerability (if->while) in nimcp_bio_router.c:260
Converted mutex pool stats to atomics in nimcp_mutex_pool.c:194-227

name: Security_Fixes_Dec2024
observations: Fixed CRITICAL ReDoS vulnerability with pattern complexity validation in nimcp_pattern_db.c
Fixed buffer overflow by converting sprintf to snprintf in nimcp_sbom.c
Implemented secure RNG with getrandom() in nimcp_swarm_immune.c
Fixed BBB TOCTOU race condition in nimcp_blood_brain_barrier.c
Fixed path traversal strcpy in nimcp_path_traversal.c

name: Mutex_API_Standardization
observations: Standardized 45+ files to use nimcp_platform_mutex_* API
Removed all direct pthread_mutex_* calls from bridge code
Affected modules: cognitive immune bridges, perception immune bridges, cortical sleep bridges, plasticity immune bridges, middleware immune bridges, networking immune bridges

name: Enum_Validation_Fixes
observations: Fixed swarm immune enum bounds checking (5 locations)
Fixed consensus array bounds in nimcp_swarm_consensus.c
Added rate limiter overflow protection in nimcp_rate_limiter.c
Added NaN/Inf checks in LNN training

name: CNN_Training_Module
observations: Fully implemented CNN training module in src/training/nimcp_cnn_training.c
Layer construction functions: cnn_add_conv2d, cnn_add_pool, cnn_add_batch_norm, cnn_add_dropout, cnn_add_dense, cnn_add_flatten
Training API: cnn_forward, cnn_backward, cnn_step, cnn_train_epoch, cnn_validate, cnn_fit
Data pipeline: cnn_dataloader_create, cnn_next_batch, cnn_augment_batch with Fisher-Yates shuffle
Uses He initialization for weights (Box-Muller transform)
Augmentation supports flips, noise, brightness, contrast, cutout
All 97 tests passing (52 unit, 11 E2E, 15 integration, 19 regression)
68 CNN backprop tests passing (Unit: 16, Integration: 10, Regression: 14, E2E: 28)
cnn_trainer_zero_grad() API added for gradient zeroing
cnn_get_layer_weight_grad() API added for gradient inspection
Softmax and GELU activations implemented with numerical stability

name: CNN_Cortex_Bridge
observations: Bridges CNN training with visual and audio cortexes
Supports multimodal feature extraction from A/V cortexes
Learning rate modulation based on perception quality
Gradient feedback to cortex for fine-tuning

name: LNN_RNG_Reproducibility_Fix
observations: Root cause: srand() was called but actual RNG used rand_r(&tls_seed) with separate thread-local seed
Box-Muller transform cached spare values that weren't being reset between seeded calls
Added set_rng_seed() function to set thread-local seed in nimcp_lnn_neuron.c
Added randn_reset() function to clear Box-Muller state (g_randn_has_spare, g_randn_spare)
Modified lnn_neuron_init_weights() to call set_rng_seed() and randn_reset() before weight initialization

name: STDP_Bridge_Fix_Dec2024
observations: Fixed double free or corruption crash in test_snn_stdp_bridge caused by duplicate header files
Root cause: Two different stdp_synapse_t definitions - old header at include/plasticity/nimcp_stdp.h missing spinlock and sleep_state fields
Correct header at include/plasticity/stdp/nimcp_stdp.h has full struct definition
Valgrind revealed Invalid write of size 8 in stdp_synapse_init_with_config - buffer overrun due to sizeof mismatch
Test allocated 100 synapses * 80 bytes = 8000 bytes but actual struct was larger
Fixed include paths in 5 files to use plasticity/stdp/nimcp_stdp.h
Added nimcp_free(bridge->base.mutex) in snn_stdp_bridge_destroy to fix memory leak
Commit 4397bb9e pushed to master on Dec 24, 2024

name: STDP_Module
observations: Header location: include/plasticity/stdp/nimcp_stdp.h (NOT include/plasticity/nimcp_stdp.h - that was deleted)
stdp_synapse_t struct includes nimcp_spinlock_t lock and sleep_state_t current_sleep_state fields
Key functions: stdp_synapse_init, stdp_pre_spike, stdp_post_spike, stdp_pre_spike_modulated, stdp_post_spike_modulated
Integrates with neuromodulator system for reward-based learning

name: Conv2D_Backpropagation
observations: Computes weight gradients (dW) by correlating input with output gradient
Computes bias gradients (db) by summing output gradient over batch and spatial dims
Computes input gradients (dX) via transposed convolution for previous layer
Supports padding, dilation, stride, and group convolutions
Uses same index calculations as forward pass for consistency
All 97 CNN-related tests pass after implementation

name: Optimizer_Memory_Fix_Dec2024
observations: Fixed critical memory corruption in optimizer state buffer reallocation
Bug: optimizer state buffers (m, v tensors) allocated once for first layer's parameter count, then reused for all layers
When subsequent layers had more parameters, buffer overflow occurred causing 'malloc(): memory corruption (fast)'
Fixed all 6 optimizer step functions: step_sgd, step_adam, step_adamw, step_nadam, step_rmsprop, step_adagrad
Added condition 'count > state->count' to check if reallocation needed
Added proper buffer cleanup before reallocation

name: CNN_Activation_Improvements
observations: Implemented softmax activation in cnn_apply_activation() with numerical stability (max subtraction)
Added CNN_LAYER_ACTIVATION handler in forward and backward passes
Layer type 8 (CNN_LAYER_ACTIVATION) now properly handled in switch statements

name: CNN_Gradient_API
observations: Added cnn_trainer_zero_grad() - zeros all layer gradients between backward passes
Added cnn_get_layer_weight_grad() - returns copy of layer weight gradients for inspection
Fixed regression test stub that was returning random data instead of real gradients
All 68 CNN backprop tests now pass (Unit: 16, Integration: 10, Regression: 14, E2E: 28)

name: CLAUDE_MD_Modularization
observations: Modularized CLAUDE.md from 1357 lines to 67 lines (95% reduction)
Created docs/claude/ directory with 8 topic files and modules/ subdirectory with 10 module docs
Module docs: hemispheric-brain.md, pink-noise.md, brain-immune.md, training-immune.md, cross-bridge.md, lnn.md, bio-async.md, introspection.md, positional-encoding.md, tensor.md
Main CLAUDE.md now contains quick reference tables linking to submodules

name: Git_Cleanup_Dec2024
observations: File was already in .gitignore but was tracked before gitignore was added
Used 'git rm --cached' to untrack while preserving local file

name: P0_Fixes_Dec2024
observations: Completed P0 Thread Safety fixes in nimcp_optimizers.c: Added state_mutex for thread-safe buffer reallocation in all step functions (SGD, Adam, AdamW, NAdam, RMSprop, AdaGrad)
Completed P0 Thread Safety fixes in nimcp_gradient_manager.c: Added accum_mutex for thread-safe accum_buffer reallocation with TOCTOU prevention
Completed P0 Numerical Stability fixes in nimcp_bcm.c: Added isnan/isinf validation before weight updates in bcm_apply_rule and bcm_apply_rule_modulated
Completed P0 Numerical Stability fixes in nimcp_stdp.c: Added isnan/isinf validation before weight updates in stdp_pre_spike, stdp_post_spike, and stdp_apply_modulated_weight_change
Completed P0 Numerical Stability fixes in nimcp_lnn_gradient.c: Added isnan/isinf validation in lnn_gradient_clip to prevent NaN/Inf propagation through gradient scaling
All 68 training tests passed (16 unit + 10 integration + 14 regression + 28 e2e)

name: CodeReview_Dec2024
observations: Comprehensive code review of entire NIMCP codebase completed Dec 2024
8 parallel review agents covered: Core Brain, Cognitive, Plasticity, LNN/Training, Perception, Middleware, Swarm/Security, Utils/Infrastructure
All modules scored 7.5/10 with various P0/P1/P2 issues identified
All P0 and P1 issues fixed and committed (38b38829)

name: ExecutiveThreadSafety
observations: P0 fix: Added task_mutex to executive_controller struct in nimcp_executive.c
Protects task_queue, active_task, num_tasks, stats from race conditions
Added mutex lock/unlock to executive_add_task, executive_switch_task, executive_complete_task
Fixed potential deadlock by releasing mutex before calling nested functions
Added bounds check to prevent underflow when num_tasks == 0

name: AttentionPoolThreadSafety
observations: P1 fix: Thread-safe lazy initialization for attention memory pool
Added atomic_flag for double-checked locking pattern
Prevents race condition where two threads create pools (memory leak)

name: TripletSTDPSubnormalFix
observations: P1 fix: Flush subnormal traces to zero in nimcp_triplet_stdp.c
Added checks in triplet_stdp_update_traces, pre_spike, and post_spike
Flushes r1_pre, r2_pre, o1_post, o2_post to 0 when < 1e-10
Prevents denormal arithmetic slowdown (10-100x performance hit)

name: FeatureExtractorPoolFallback
observations: P1 fix: Heap allocation fallback when memory pool exhausted
Added from_pool tracking to properly release/free buffers
Prevents unnecessary failures under high concurrent load

name: STDPAtomicWeightClamp
observations: P0 fix: Atomic weight clamping in nimcp_stdp.c
Changed separate weight update + if clamps to single fmaxf/fminf operation
Prevents torn reads during concurrent weight updates

name: CorpusCallosumFixes
observations: P0 fix: Double-free prevention - NULL after free in queue_destroy
P0 fix: Integer overflow prevention in sequence number calculation
Cast to uint64_t before multiplication to prevent overflow

name: NumericalStabilityFixes
observations: Amygdala: dt_ms validation and NaN checks in nimcp_amygdala.c
LNN layer: NaN/Inf checks in gradient computation with conservative epsilon
LNN neuron: Adaptive tau epsilon based on tau_min
Eligibility trace: NaN/Inf validation in all 3 weight update locations
BCM: NaN/Inf checks before weight updates

name: P2_Fixes_Dec2024
observations: Completed 7 P2 fixes from comprehensive code review on 2024-12-25
Commit 4de8e902: fix: Address P2 issues from comprehensive code review
All fixes compile and pass existing tests (215+ tests verified)

name: P2_NumericalStability_WorkingMemory
observations: Added MIN_DECAY_EXPONENT constant (-80.0F) to prevent expf() underflow
Clamps decay exponent to prevent salience from underflowing to exactly 0
Biological basis: Items should decay to threshold, not instantly disappear

name: P2_BCMPrecision
observations: Changed accumulators from float to double in bcm_compute_stats()
Prevents precision loss with large synapse counts (float has 24-bit mantissa)
Double has 53-bit mantissa - handles ~10^15 synapses accurately

name: P2_HeterosynapticPerformance
observations: Avoids expensive sqrtf() in neighbor finding hot loop
sqrtf is ~10x slower than arithmetic operations
Uses d² <= r² comparison instead of d <= r

name: P2_STDPSleepValidation
observations: Added bounds check for sleep state enum in stdp_set_sleep_state()
Validates state is between SLEEP_STATE_AWAKE and SLEEP_STATE_REM
Prevents array index overflow in sleep bridge lookup tables
Logs warning and defaults to AWAKE on invalid state

name: P2_SignalWrapperCoW
observations: Added NULL checks for CoW handles and managers in signal_wrapper_acquire()
Validates source wrapper is in valid state before acquiring reference
Prevents inconsistent reference creation from partially failed wrappers

name: P2_ThalamicRouterOverflow
observations: Added saturation checks for all uint64_t stats counters
Prevents wraparound after 2^64 signals (theoretical edge case)

name: P2_TensorAlignmentAssert
observations: Verifies alignment is power of 2 (required by posix_memalign)
Compile-time safety prevents runtime allocation failures

name: engram_system
observations: Engram array initially allocated via unified memory (CoW) with engrams_handle
expand_engram_array must check engrams_handle before freeing - use unified_mem_free for unified memory, nimcp_free for direct
ENGRAM_INITIAL_CAPACITY is 512 - crash occurs when growing beyond this if realloc used on unified memory
After growth, always use nimcp_calloc and set engrams_handle=NULL

name: bio_msg_queue
observations: bio_msg_queue_grow() dynamically resizes queues when full
Queues grow from tier-based initial size up to MAX_INBOX_MESSAGES (1024)
Queue overflow log is DEBUG level (expected under high load)
enqueue tries to grow queue instead of immediately failing

name: nimcp_platform_once
observations: Cross-platform one-time initialization API in utils/platform/nimcp_platform_once.h
Wraps pthread_once on POSIX and InitOnceExecuteOnce on Windows
ALWAYS use this instead of raw pthread_once for portability

name: platform_once_refactor_2025-12-26
observations: Refactored 3 files to use nimcp_platform_once instead of raw pthread_once
distributed_cow.c: bio-async registration and registry mutex init
All 111 related tests pass (20 distributed_cow, 78 oligodendrocyte, 13 security)

name: TOCTOU
observations: Attack exploits gap between validation check and resource use
Tokens are single-use and expire quickly to prevent exploitation

name: codebase_review_2025-12-27
observations: Identified 25 CRITICAL, 32 HIGH, 39 MEDIUM, 39 LOW issues

name: thread_safety_patterns
observations: Use nimcp_platform_once() for one-time initialization - NOT raw pthread_once
Use __atomic_fetch_add() for stats counters instead of mutex
Never invoke callbacks while holding mutex - copy data first, unlock, then call
Use atomic loads/stores for global bool flags like g_*_initialized
Check fread() return value when reading from /dev/urandom
For realloc: use temp variable to preserve original on failure
Add overflow checks before size_t multiplications
Use nimcp_spinlock for microglia cytokine reads
Hash table thread_safe flag exists but NOT implemented - will reject if true

name: protocol_metrics_fix
observations: Was completely unprotected - CRITICAL thread safety issue
All public functions now lock/unlock properly

name: crypto_security_fixes
observations: Replaced rand() with getrandom() in nimcp_nlp_session.c nonce generation
Removed weak entropy fallback in nimcp_shadow_stack.c canary generation
Added /dev/urandom as fallback, fail if no secure source available

name: rate_limiter_fix
observations: Converted nested mutex stats to atomic operations
Prevents deadlock from acquiring limiter_lock while holding bucket_lock

name: event_bus_fixes
observations: Fixed worker thread blocking forever on shutdown
Added shutdown flag check in condition wait loop
Used nimcp_platform_once for security init race fix

name: GameTheoryModule
observations: All 84 regression tests passing as of 2025-12-27
All 15 e2e tests passing as of 2025-12-27
Includes Auctions (first-price, second-price, VCG), Bargaining (Nash, Kalai-Smorodinsky), Credit Assignment (Shapley values)
Hemispheric bargaining uses 101 feasible set samples for Nash solution resolution
nimcp_auction_resolve handles cancelled auctions by returning NIMCP_AUCTION_STATE_CANCELLED
REG_AUC_031 fix: Large auction payment for 100 bidders with bids 10-1009 is 1497.0 (second-price)
REG_AUC_101 fix: Set max_bidders=128 for repeated bid tests exceeding 32 bids
REG_CRE_031 fix: Weighted voting [1,1,2] quota=3 gives Shapley values P0=P1=1/6, P2=4/6
Enhanced with 8 new submodules as of 2025-12-27

New modules: gt_repeated (folk theorem, trigger strategies), gt_coalition (hedonic games, core stability), gt_equilibrium (Nash solver, Lemke-Howson), gt_learning (Q-learning, CFR, fictitious play), gt_mechanism (mechanism design, signaling games), gt_fairness (Jain, Gini, Theil, envy-freeness), gt_spatial (replicator dynamics, network effects), gt_auction_ext (combinatorial, double, multi-unit auctions)
Added gt_tom (Theory of Mind) integration module
Fixed gt_hemi_set_bargaining_power() to update internal bargaining context
All 168 game theory tests passing (4 unit test files, 84 regression, 20 integration, 1 e2e)

observations: Complete self-healing code immune system implemented 2025-12-27
Enables runtime crash recovery and hot-patching
Uses biological B-cell/antibody model for crash handling
Components: code_immune, self_heal, claude_healer, dwarf_symbols, hot_inject, recompiler
174 total tests: 46 unit, 46 integration, 66 regression, 16 e2e

name: CodebaseReview_Dec27_2025
observations: Identified CRITICAL issues: cache ref_count race conditions, missing middleware mutex protection, conflicting error codes, weak security hash
Identified HIGH issues: mutex memory leaks in SNN/glial, GPU P2P copy bug, LNN/Portia global state races
Found test coverage gaps for 13+ integration files including game theory modules
Found 8+ tests with empty SUCCEED() calls providing no validation

name: FixSession_Dec27_2025
observations: COMPLETED: Cache ref_count atomics - replaced with __atomic_fetch_add/sub and __atomic_load_n
COMPLETED: Security hash timing oracle - added constant-time comparison using nimcp_ct_memcmp
COMPLETED: SNN mutex memory leak - added nimcp_free after nimcp_mutex_destroy
COMPLETED: Glial astrocyte memory leak - added nimcp_free after nimcp_platform_mutex_destroy
COMPLETED: JEPA CRC32 race condition - replaced bool flag with pthread_once
COMPLETED: JEPA uninitialized variable - fixed spatial_idx in tube mask generation
COMPLETED: Forward chaining stats bug - fixed incorrect time calculation
COMPLETED: Middleware mutex protection - added thread-safety to attention_gate and adaptive_normalizer
COMPLETED: GPU P2P copy bug - added actual memcpy in mock backend
COMPLETED: Portia degradation thread safety - added mutex protection with nimcp_platform_once
COMPLETED: Adaptive pool race condition - used nimcp_platform_once and atomic pointer
COMPLETED: Reasoning factory bio-async race - used atomics and nimcp_platform_once
COMPLETED: JEPA latent comment fix - corrected misleading TLS comment to atomics
COMPLETED: Self heal forward declaration - added signal_crash_context_t typedef
COMPLETED: Gemini settings.json MCP args format fix
Commit c2fc59a8 - 7 files changed, 177 insertions, 29 deletions

name: GameTheoryIntegration
observations: Implemented in commit 82062c82 with 27 files changed (+8730/-1069 lines)
Core modules: nimcp_auction.c, nimcp_bargaining.c, nimcp_credit_assignment.c, nimcp_mechanism_design.c
Integration modules: gt_global_workspace.c, gt_working_memory.c, gt_neuromod.c, gt_hemispheric.c
Uses second-price auctions for GW broadcast access
Uses priority auctions for WM slot allocation
Maps game outcomes to neuromodulator release (DA for wins, 5-HT for losses, NE for unfairness)
Uses Nash bargaining and Shapley credit for hemispheric coordination
Missing test coverage - tests being added

name: HealBridgeModule
observations: Connects self_heal engine with code_immune system
Four major enhancements: sandbox validation, pattern evolution, multi-step fix chains, rollback support
Sandbox Validation: Fork-based isolation tests fixes before injection, validates code structure (balanced braces), detects infinite loops
Pattern Evolution: Tracks LNN-generated fixes as candidates, promotes to pattern library after threshold successes (default 3), rejects on low success rate
Multi-Step Fix Chains: Supports up to 8 fixes per chain with dependencies (NONE, SEQUENTIAL, PREREQUISITE, MUTEX, COMPLEMENTARY)
Rollback Support: Maintains history of applied fixes with configurable time window (default 60s), supports chain rollback
Uses biological model: germinal center reaction, affinity maturation, clonal selection
Key APIs: heal_bridge_process_crash(), heal_bridge_validate_fix(), heal_bridge_register_candidate(), heal_bridge_create_chain(), heal_bridge_rollback()

name: game_theory_module
observations: Contains 8 sub-modules: equilibrium, learning, mechanism, coalition, repeated, fairness, auction_ext, spatial
All 283 unit tests pass across 8 test suites
Fixed deadlock in nimcp_spatial_run by adding is_ess_unlocked() helper
Fixed deadlock in coalition formation by adding is_individually_rational_unlocked() and is_in_core_unlocked() helpers
Deadlock pattern: Never call public mutex-locking functions from within locked code - create *_unlocked() helpers

name: KG_Update_Convention
observations: Knowledge Graph must be updated whenever new functionality is added to NIMCP
Use context='nimcp' and location='project' for all memory operations
New modules should have entities created with: name, type, file locations, capabilities, test status
Integration points should document: attach functions, biological effects, commit references
Link new modules to related existing entities (e.g., Brain Immune System, FEP, etc.)

name: Self_Awareness_Architecture
observations: NIMCP requires runtime KG access for true self-awareness
KG contains system's knowledge about itself: modules, capabilities, integrations, conventions
Self-model system (brain->self_model) should integrate with KG for introspection
Introspection module (brain->introspection) needs KG queries for capability reflection
Runtime KG reader needed: load entities, relations, query by name/type
Enables: 'What modules do I have?', 'How does parietal connect to immune?', 'What are my capabilities?'
Connects autobiographical memory (brain->autobio) with structural self-knowledge
Key integration points: self_model_system_t, introspection_context_t, autobiographical_memory_t

name: KG_Reader_Module
observations: Knowledge Graph Reader for runtime self-awareness and introspection
Provides entity/relation queries: kg_reader_get_entity(), kg_reader_get_entities_by_type(), kg_reader_search_entities()
Provides introspection helpers: kg_reader_get_module_names(), kg_reader_get_module_capabilities(), kg_reader_generate_self_description()
Integrated into brain_struct with kg_reader field and enable_kg_reader config flag
Brain accessors: brain_get_kg_reader(), brain_reload_kg(), brain_is_kg_modified(), brain_generate_self_description()
Connects to self_model, introspection, and autobiographical memory subsystems
Enables answers to: 'What modules do I have?', 'How am I organized?', 'What can I do?'

name: Medulla_Module
observations: Manages sleep-wake coupling with all brain subsystems
Integrated into brain_struct with medulla field and medulla_enabled config flag
Connected to immune system via nimcp_medulla_immune_bridge.c

name: Dragonfly_Module
observations: Bio-inspired target tracking and interception system (Phase 7.3)
Implements dragonfly visual hunting with 95% biological success rate
Components: TSDN (population vector), CSTMD1 (selective attention), IMM filter (prediction), PN guidance (interception)
Integrated into brain_struct with dragonfly field
Brain accessors: brain_get_dragonfly(), brain_dragonfly_detect(), brain_dragonfly_get_command(), brain_dragonfly_abort()
Bridges to parietal lobe for spatial processing: dragonfly_parietal_bridge_create()
